title: Údržba todo: edit, clear, status
goal: Round out the ideas archive: add 'mini todo edit <n> "<text>"' to rewrite an existing item's text and 'mini todo clear' to drop all done items in one go, and show the open-todo count in 'mini status' (e.g. 'Ideas: N open'); each behaviour covered by unit tests.

steps.title: mini todo edit action
steps.detail: Add an 'edit <n> <text...>' case to commands/todo.ts that rewrites item n's text in place (preserving its done state), with range/empty-text guards reusing parseIndex; unit tests.

steps.title: mini todo clear action
steps.detail: Add a 'clear' case that removes all done items at once (no-op with a clear message when none are done); unit test for both cases.

steps.title: Open-todo count in mini status
steps.detail: In commands/status.ts read the archive and print an 'Ideas: N open' line (omitted or shown as none when the archive is empty); unit/render test.

steps.title: README and CHANGELOG
steps.detail: Document edit / clear and the status Ideas line in README (commands table + /mini:todo argument-hint and slash body) and add an English CHANGELOG entry.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 100: Údržba todo: edit, clear, status
